name: NIH Grant Application Structure Mindmap
input: Create a mindmap showing the structure of an NIH R01 grant application. Root: NIH R01 Grant. Level 1 branches: Specific Aims (1 page), Research Strategy (12 pages), Budget, Biographical Sketches, Protection of Human Subjects. Under Specific Aims: Background and Rationale, Overall Objective, Central Hypothesis, Specific Aim 1 (with sub-aim 1a and 1b), Specific Aim 2, Specific Aim 3, Expected Outcomes, Impact Statement. Under Research Strategy: Significance (Innovation Gap, Preliminary Data), Innovation (Novel Methods, New Paradigm), Approach (Study Design, Data Analysis, Timeline, Potential Problems and Solutions, Rigor and Reproducibility). Under Budget: Personnel, Equipment, Supplies, Travel, Indirect Costs.
qualityCriteria: Root node is NIH R01 Grant or similar
All 5 Level 1 branches present (Specific Aims, Research Strategy, Budget, Biographical Sketches, Protection of Human Subjects)
Specific Aims sub-items present (Background, Hypothesis, Aim 1, Aim 2, Aim 3)
Research Strategy sub-items present (Significance, Innovation, Approach)
At least 3 levels of hierarchy depth
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Mindmap with root, 5 main branches, 3+ hierarchy levels, comprehensive NIH grant structure.
